findings.summary: RC-A: addMutation.onSuccess lacks electron-store persistence — the P0 data loss bug. Confirmed by comparing addMutation (L129-146) vs onSave pattern (L380-397).
RC-B: Nested Dialog portals cause focus-trap conflicts. DialogEditMcp wraps in <Dialog> inside DialogSelectMcp's <Dialog>. Fix: render as panel div.
RC-C: handleEdit has no fallback when server not in electron-store — silent failure.
RC-D: All CRUD error paths use console.warn; toggle mutation has no onError at all.
RC-E: No URL validation in dialog-edit-mcp handleSave for remote type.

Root-cause-analyst hallucinated URL.canParse at line 63 of dialog-edit-mcp.tsx. Actual line 63 is `command: command().split(...).filter(Boolean),`. No URL validation exists — Fix E must ADD it from scratch.
No existing tests for dialog-select-mcp or dialog-edit-mcp. Regression tests: server-sync.test.ts, dialog-custom-provider.test.ts, submit.test.ts, helpers.test.ts.
Fix A validation: add server then close/reopen dialog then verify persisted in store.json. Pattern: onSuccess must call api.getMcpServers() then api.setMcpServers().
Fix B validation: DialogEditMcp must NOT import Dialog/useDialog, must render styled div panel, dialog.close() calls replaced with props.onCancel(). Parent editingEntry() controls visibility.
Fix C validation: handleEdit must construct default McpServerEntry from sync.data.mcp[name] when entry not found in electron-store.
Fix D validation: showToast import needed from @opencode-ai/ui/toast. 5 error paths: handleEdit, confirmRemove, onSave, toggle, addMutation.
Fix E validation: No URL validation currently exists in dialog-edit-mcp handleSave. Must ADD validation, not fix existing.
Both root-cause-analyst and validation-designer hallucinated URL.canParse check at line 63 of dialog-edit-mcp.tsx. Actual line 63 is a command split. No URL validation exists in current file.
